/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gyatt.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/gyatt.dir/src/commit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gyatt.dir/src/ignore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gyatt.dir/src/index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gyatt.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gyatt.dir/src/object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gyatt.dir/src/repository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gyatt.dir/src/utils.cpp.o -o gyatt  /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so -lcurl
